summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lucky Jack - Switzerland Lotto Pattern Analyzer app. All backend APIs working perfectly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with all tabs, features, and integrations working correctly. Successfully tested dashboard stats, draw history, patterns, predictions, and add draw functionality.
passed_tests: Draws endpoint returning all historical data
Patterns endpoint with digit reversals and series patterns
Predictions endpoint with smart number generator
Error handling for invalid draw inputs
Dashboard tab navigation and stats display
Draw History tab with 1158 draws and delete buttons
Patterns tab with digit reversals and series patterns
Add Draw modal opening and form validation
Add Draw end-to-end functionality (successfully added test draw)
Hot/Cold numbers display with frequency counts
Last Draws section showing recent draws
Real-time data updates after adding new draw
